_instructions: Fill in your API keys below and save this file. Remove the placeholder text and replace with your actual keys.

_how_to_get_keys.opensanctions_api_key: 1. Go to https://www.opensanctions.org/api/ 2. Sign up for free 3. Copy your API key
_how_to_get_keys.courtlistener_token: 1. Go to https://www.courtlistener.com/ 2. Register for free 3. Go to profile page and generate API token

_module_toggles: Set to false to disable specific screening modules
_advanced: Advanced settings - change only if you know what you're doing
